pattern_summary: 运维账号在变更窗口内批量登录跳板机执行自动化改密脚本
alert_signature: Bulk login by ops account during change window from jump host
fp_reason: 运维团队在已审批变更窗口内执行的合规批量改密操作，登录模式与变更工单时间窗口完全吻合

pattern_summary: 夜间备份任务产生大流量网络传输触发数据外泄告警
alert_signature: Large outbound data transfer during off-hours from backup server
entity_pattern: account=backup-svc type=service_account; host=BACKUP-SRV-03 role=backup_server; dst_port=873; traffic_volume=high; time=night
fp_reason: 每日定时异地备份任务，传输目标为可信灾备中心，流量特征与备份配置一致

pattern_summary: 内部漏洞扫描器发起全网端口扫描被误判为横向移动
alert_signature: Sequential port scan across internal subnets from designated scanner host
entity_pattern: account=scanner-svc type=service_account; host=SCANNER-01 role=vuln_scanner; behavior=sequential_port_scan; dst_ports=common
fp_reason: Tenable/Nessus 定期漏洞扫描任务，源 IP 在 CMDB 中标注为授权扫描器

pattern_summary: 自动化部署工具批量 SSH 登录多台服务器触发暴力破解告警
alert_signature: Multiple SSH login attempts to production servers in short window from CI/CD runner
entity_pattern: account=deploy-bot type=service_account; host=CI-RUNNER-07 role=ci_runner; protocol=ssh; target_count=high; time_window=short
fp_reason: Ansible Tower 在自动化部署窗口内通过 SSH 批量推送配置，使用密钥认证且均在 CMDB 资产清单内

pattern_summary: 域控制器之间正常 AD 复制流量被误判为可疑域控通信
alert_signature: Unusual LDAP replication traffic between domain controllers across WAN links
fp_reason: AD 多站点复制拓扑的标准同步流量，频率与站点链接复制间隔配置一致

pattern_summary: DHCP 服务器大规模 IP 续租导致网络异常告警
alert_signature: Surge in ARP traffic and IP lease renewal across office VLAN at lease expiry boundary
fp_reason: 租约达半生命周期时的正常续租波峰，ARP 表刷新导致的瞬时广播增加

pattern_summary: 安全监测工具自身代理流量被误判为 C2 通信
alert_signature: Encrypted outbound connections with beaconing pattern from security sensor hosts
entity_pattern: account=edr-agent type=service_account; host=ENDPOINT-* role=workstation; dst_ip=edr-cloud-sink; protocol=https; behavior=regular_heartbeat
fp_reason: EDR Agent 与云端控制台的心跳与遥测上报，TLS 加密且目标为已注册的安全产品 SaaS 端点

pattern_summary: VPN 网关集中时段大量员工拨入触发异常地理位置登录告警
alert_signature: Multiple concurrent VPN logins from geographically distributed IPs within morning rush hour
entity_pattern: account=* type=employee; src_ips=diverse_geo; protocol=vpn; time=morning_rush; behavior=concurrent_login_spike
fp_reason: 周一早高峰远程办公集中拨入，IP 分布广因员工使用不同运营商/家庭宽带，二次认证均通过

pattern_summary: 邮件安全网关拦截群发钓鱼邮件测试导致 SOC 工单风暴
alert_signature: Mass phishing campaign alert from email security gateway targeting internal users
entity_pattern: account=* type=email_recipient; src_smtp=sandbox-phish-sim; subject=Security Awareness; behavior=simulated_phish
fp_reason: 安全团队授权的季度钓鱼演练，发件域在安全网关白名单中但演练标记未同步至 SOC 平台

pattern_summary: 开发环境大规模 npm/pip 包安装触发恶意软件下载告警
alert_signature: Bulk download of packages from public registries by developer workstations flagged as suspicious binary fetch
entity_pattern: account=dev-* type=developer; host=DEV-WS-* role=workstation; dst=registry.npmjs.org,pypi.org; behavior=package_install_batch
fp_reason: 新员工入职日批量克隆项目仓库并安装依赖，npm/pip 源为官方注册表且包哈希可验证

pattern_summary: 财务系统月底批量导出报表触发 DLP 大量文件读取告警
alert_signature: Large volume of file reads and exports from finance shared drive at month-end close
entity_pattern: account=finance-* type=employee; host=FIN-APP-02 role=application_server; file_pattern=*.xlsx,*.csv; behavior=bulk_export; time=month_end
fp_reason: 财务月结常规流程，每月最后三个工作日固定执行，操作账号均已完成 PAM 签出

pattern_summary: 容器集群自动弹性伸缩触发进程异常创建告警
alert_signature: Rapid process creation bursts on Kubernetes nodes during horizontal pod autoscaling event
entity_pattern: host=K8S-NODE-* role=kubernetes_node; container_name=*; image_registry=internal; behavior=hpa_scale_out; process_count=high
fp_reason: 业务峰值 HPA 触发从 5→20 副本扩容，每个 Pod 启动时的 init container 与 sidecar 注入导致的瞬时进程创建
